root: `unicli-mcp` binary support lets `npx -y @zenalexa/unicli-mcp` boot the MCP server directly for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Continue, and similar clients.
`server.json` now ships at the package root for MCP registry discovery.
The npm package now includes the Uni-CLI skill packs under `skills/`, so global installs give agents the usage, repair, browser, and smart-search guidance without a separate clone.
`AGENTS.md` includes the MCP one-liner config block and current command-contract metadata.
zh: `unicli-mcp` 二进制入口让 `npx -y @zenalexa/unicli-mcp` 可以直接启动 MCP server，方便 Claude Desktop、Cursor、Continue 等客户端配置。
包根目录新增 `server.json`，用于 MCP registry 发现。
npm 包现在随包发布 `skills/` 下的 Uni-CLI skill pack，全局安装后 Agent 不需要额外 clone 就能拿到使用、修复、浏览器和 smart-search 指引。
`AGENTS.md` 增加 MCP 一行配置块，并同步当前命令契约元数据。
